job_title: Senior Data Analytics Reporting Analyst - Investment Consultancy & Oversight and Multi-Manager Solutions
strengths: Strong Python and SQL ETL pipeline experience
Dashboard and reporting automation (Power BI, Tableau)
Demonstrated data quality and validation practices
Quantified impact on efficiency and revenue
weaknesses: Limited explicit investment management or portfolio experience
No stated machine learning or factor research work
Short professional tenure in relevant roles
No mention of backtesting or model governance processes
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with investment professionals to understand analytical needs and translate them into data solutions, models, and reporting, ensuring alignment with business objectives, and proactively identifying and proposing solutions for data coverage gaps.

Managed data feeds and relationships with key data providers, ensuring data quality, consistency, and accessibility across multiple platforms and databases for investment oversight and research activities.

Developed and enhanced quantitative models, analytical tools, and performance attribution systems, including supporting backtesting and scenario analysis efforts in coordination with investment strategy teams, applying sound model governance practices.

Produced regular and ad-hoc reports for investment teams and senior management, designing and maintaining dashboard capabilities that provide stakeholders with ready access to performance reports, risk metrics, and strategy dashboards.

Explored opportunities to leverage emerging capabilities, including machine learning, to enhance analytical infrastructure and support new product development through data analysis and quantitative modeling.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
TalentAlly

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Senior Data Analytics Reporting Analyst - Investment Consultancy & Oversight and Multi-Manager Solutions position at TalentAlly. With my background in data engineering, analytics, and reporting, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

I am particularly impressed by Columbia Threadneedle Investments' commitment to client success and their expansive global reach, which creates a dynamic environment for data-driven insights and innovation.

In my previous roles, I have developed robust data pipelines and reporting workflows that significantly improved efficiency and accuracy. Additionally, I have created targeted customer segmentation models that led to substantial revenue increases, which directly aligns with your need for rigorous investment oversight and high-quality research.

At Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows that replaced manual reporting, increasing work efficiency by 40%. I also built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy. My experience includes sourcing and validating investment data from multiple platforms, ensuring data quality and accessibility, and partnering with Enterprise Technology teams to enhance data infrastructure. I have also managed data feeds from key providers and collaborated with investment professionals to understand their analytical needs and translate them into effective data solutions.

I am particularly drawn to TalentAlly's mission of fostering an inclusive and performance-based culture, and believe my experience in building and maintaining quantitative models, analytical tools, and performance attribution systems, including applying sound model governance practices, would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
